text:
enrolled for the month 

COMMENT: CCW obtains this directly from the MBSF BENE_MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_01–12 variables. 

This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was entitled to Medicare Part A, Part B, or both for a 
given month. It also indicates whether the beneficiary’s state of residence paid his/her monthly 
premium for Part B coverage (and Part A if necessary). State Medicaid programs can pay those 
premiums for certain dual eligibles; this action is “buying in” and so this
